resources.title: OpenAI Agents SDK Documentation
resources.author: OpenAI
resources.description_en: Official SDK for building agentic systems with tool calling, handoffs, and guardrails.
resources.description_fr: SDK officiel pour construire des systèmes agentiques avec tool calling, handoffs et garde-fous.

resources.title: Anthropic — Building Effective Agents
resources.author: Anthropic
resources.description_en: Anthropic's guidelines for building agentic systems progressively and safely.
resources.description_fr: Recommandations d'Anthropic pour construire des systèmes agentiques progressivement et en sécurité.

resources.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
resources.author: NIST
resources.description_en: Framework for managing AI risks: Map, Measure, Manage, Govern.
resources.description_fr: Cadre de gestion des risques IA : Map, Measure, Manage, Govern.

resources.title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0
resources.author: NIST
resources.description_en: Cybersecurity framework applicable to AI agent deployments.
resources.description_fr: Cadre de cybersécurité applicable aux déploiements d'agents IA.

resources.title: Loi organique n° 2004-63 relative à la protection des données personnelles
resources.author: République Tunisienne
resources.description_en: Tunisian personal data protection law (2004), currently under reform.
resources.description_fr: Loi tunisienne sur la protection des données personnelles (2004), en cours de réforme.
